Subject: TW administrative contract # 27698
Message:
We have established a new FT in CBS (CR 27698) to track capacity availability due to the Red Rockl Expansion.  We would like to execute the agreement in CBS so the volumes can be sent to CAS.  

Please note this contract is for administrative purposes only and should not be invoiced and should not be included in any reporting.  If there are no concerns, I will activate this contract tomorrow morning (10/30/01).
